info.name: Open WebUI
info.summary: Chat interface for local AI models (Ollama, OpenAI-compatible)
info.description:
Open WebUI is a feature-rich, user-friendly chat interface for interacting with large language models.
**Features:** - Beautiful, intuitive chat interface - Supports Ollama and OpenAI-compatible APIs - Conversation history and organization - Document upload for RAG (Retrieval Augmented Generation) - Model switching during conversations - Multi-user support with authentication - Customizable system prompts and parameters - Export/import conversations - Mobile-friendly responsive design
**Connects to:** - Ollama ExApp (recommended for local AI) - Any OpenAI-compatible API endpoint - Hugging Face Text Generation Inference
**Requirements:** - Install alongside Ollama ExApp for the best experience - Or configure an external OpenAI-compatible API
This ExApp runs Open WebUI as a sidecar container managed by Nextcloud's AppAPI.
info.author: Conduction

variable.name: OLLAMA_BASE_URL
variable.description: URL to Ollama API (default: auto-detect from Ollama ExApp)

variable.name: OPENAI_API_BASE_URL
variable.description: Optional: URL to OpenAI-compatible API (e.g., TGI, vLLM)

variable.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
variable.description: Optional: API key for OpenAI-compatible endpoint

variable.name: ENABLE_SIGNUP
variable.description: Allow new user registration (default: false - use Nextcloud auth)
